titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 611

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=942 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 12:40:59.717249+00 | translation moa=943 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 12:40:59.706443+00

div.p:
. W . dei gratia Rex Scott’ . Omnibus probis Hominibus totius terre sue clericis et laicis  salutem . Sciant presentes et futuri . me concessisse .
et hac carta ma confirmasse . Ricard’ . nepoti simonis quondam prioris de Coldingham . uenditionem quam Radulfus
filius Elwald’ . ei fecit de uno tofto . in Coldingham . et de viginti acris terre . Tenendam . sibi . et heredibus suis de predicto
Radulfo . et heredibus suis . ita libere . et quiete sicut Carta eiusdem Radulfi . iuste testatur saluo seruicio meo .
Testibus . Walter . et Willemo Capellanis . meis . Philippo . de Valoniis . Camerario . meo . Willelmo . de boscho . Philippo . de lundin’ . Ricardo .
Reuel . apud Ieddewrd’ . secundo die Augusti .

p.cl: William by the grace of God king of the Scots to all worthy men of his entire land, clerk and lay, greeting.

Let present and future know me to have granted, and by this my charter to have made firm, to Richard, nephew of Simon formerly prior of Coldingham, the sale which Ralph son of Elwald made to him of one toft in Coldingham, and of twenty acres of land; for him and his heirs to hold of the said Ralph and his heirs, as freely and quitly as the charter of the same Ralph lawfully bears witness. Saving my service.
As witnesses, Walter and William my chaplains, Philip de Valognes my chamberlain, William del Bois, Philip of London, Richard Revel.
At Jedburgh on the second day of August.
